title: Benchmarking LLMs in Real-World Applications: Pitfalls and Surprises
author: Jean Alves

title: Feedzai TrustScore: Enabling Network Intelligence to Fight Financial Crime
author: Sofia Guerreiro

title: The GANfather: Using Malicious GenAI Agents to Combat Money Laundering
